dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6016 IH: Keep Healthcare Affordable Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Schneider introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to extend and modify the enhanced premium tax credit, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Keep Healthcare Affordable Act.

section.header: Extension and modification of enhanced premium tax credit

subsection.header: Extension of rules To increase premium assistance amounts
subsection.text: Section 36B(b)(3)(A)(iii) of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended—

paragraph.text: in the matter preceding subclause (I), by striking before January 1, 2026 and inserting before January 1, 2030, and
in the heading, by striking through 2025 and inserting through 2029.

subsection.header: Extension and modification of rule To allow credit to taxpayers whose household income exceeds specified amount
subsection.text: Section 36B(c)(1)(E) of such Code is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking through 2025.—In the case of and inserting
by adding at the end the following:

clause.text: In the case of a taxable year beginning after December 31, 2025, and before January 1, 2030, subparagraph (A) shall be applied by substituting but does not exceed 1000 percent for but does not exceed 400 percent.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to taxable years beginning after December 31, 2025.
